name: Volage
tagline: A cigar that doesn't wait for an occasion.
homeLede: A generous Canonazo crafted for a leisurely smoke. Smooth and creamy at the start, building to a rich, full-bodied crescendo.
Cultivated in the shadow of the Argopuro range, Volage leverages Java's volcanic terroir, offering a unique Indonesian expression of classic Havana-seed tobacco.
narrative: Cultivated in the shadow of the Argopuro range, Volage leverages Java's volcanic terroir, offering a unique Indonesian expression of classic Havana-seed tobacco.

An elegant, slow-burning journey for the senses. It opens with a remarkably creamy profile, seamlessly transitioning into layers of earth, wood, and dark coffee. A subtle sweetness lingers on the palate just as spice emerges.
The 24-carat gold leaf, laid by hand on every Mariposa, is the brand's signature. It stands as a quiet reminder that life isn't just to be lived, but to be celebrated.

specs.label: Construction
specs.value:
Three-part
entubado bunching
Cuban triple cap

tasting.note: Creamy and woody, grounded by a rich, underlying note of roasted coffee.
The creaminess lingers as a deep, soft sweetness begins to unfold.
Warm spice arrives, the sweetness holds, and rich volcanic earth closes the smoke.
